author: shannon
body: Added the eccentric loading progression for Devon under the running-return section.

author: demetrius
body: Good - let's hold him out of full-speed reps until he's pain-free walking.

author: shannon
body: Trey's hop testing LSI hit 92 percent today. Clearing him for straight-line sprints.

author: demetrius
body: Nice. I'll keep him off cuts and starts for another week to be safe.

author: shannon
body: Pushed the Auburn film and transcript to Coach Holloway this morning.

author: demetrius
body: Devon's 200m split from the time trial should help. Send that too.

author: shannon
body: Reworked the block-start cue: stay low through three steps, stop popping up.

author: demetrius
body: That fixed it on film. His drive phase looked much cleaner Thursday.

author: shannon
body: Bus leaves 6:30 for Oak Mountain - headcount to the office by Wednesday.

author: demetrius
body: Got it. I'll handle the timing table at the home opener.

author: shannon
body: Kayla's drifting wide on the bend. Cueing lean-from-ankles, tight inside arm.

author: demetrius
body: Let's add curve-running technique to next week's plan.

author: shannon
body: Isaiah's ankle is progressing - starting balance and proprioception work.

author: demetrius
body: Keep him on upper-body lifts so he doesn't lose fitness.

author: shannon
body: Charity 5K still needs four more finish-line volunteers.

author: demetrius
body: I'll ask a few track parents and circle back by the weekend.

author: shannon
body: Brandon's flagged academically - tutoring before he touches the throws ring.

author: demetrius
body: I set him up with study-hall check-ins. We'll watch the English grade.

author: shannon
body: Updated the meet schedule - sectional qualifier moved to Mountain Brook.

author: demetrius
body: Top four advance to state. Let's lock the relay legs after the opener.

author: shannon
body: Added the men's choir set for 1st Sunday - Total Praise in Bb.

author: demetrius
body: Marcus Reed's shins are better on the bike - easing him back to running.
